title: pouteria trifida
intro: Pouteria trifida, also known as the White Sapote, is a tropical fruit-bearing tree native to Central and South America. The bark, leaves, and seeds of Pouteria trifida have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pouteria trifida include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Pouteria trifida can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to treat various ailments, but more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
